scripts.commit:check: git diff --cached --quiet && echo 'No staged changes.' && exit 1
scripts.commit:msg: { cat prompts/git-commit.txt; printf '\n\n'; git diff --cached; } | gemini | head -n 1 | tr -d '\r'
scripts.commit: pnpm run commit:check && MSG="$(pnpm run -s commit:msg)" && git commit -m "$MSG"
